introSection: Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Hollywood in Universal City, California, USA. The ride opened on April 7, 2016 as part of The Wizarding World of Harry Potter. It is also the first Mack YoungSTAR Coaster in America.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike the two other Flight of the Hippogriff rides, this one is a YoungSTAR Coaster from Mack Rides, while the other two are standard Vekoma Junior Coasters.

fullText:
Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Hollywood in Universal City, California, USA. The ride opened on April 7, 2016 as part of The Wizarding World of Harry Potter. It is also the first Mack YoungSTAR Coaster in America.

Unlike the two other Flight of the Hippogriff rides, this one is a YoungSTAR Coaster from Mack Rides, while the other two are standard Vekoma Junior Coasters.
